items.title:
RT by @UN: Briefing the Security Council, Director Kayoko Gotoh warned that the recent drone strike in Romania that injured civilians highlights the growing risk of spillover from the war in Ukraine. We urge dialogue and negotiations to resume.

Her full remarks: https://dppa.un.org/en/news/drone-strike-in-romania-underscores-growing-risk-of-spillover-of-the-war-in-ukraine

items.title: Oil Holds Gains, US Futures Slip on War Confusion: Markets Wrap
items.summary: US equity futures edged lower and oil held gains as Washington struggled to get efforts toward an Iran peace deal back on track.

items.title: Australian Wheat Crop Expected to Drop 26% on Weather, War Costs
items.summary: Australia’s winter wheat crop is forecast to fall by more than a quarter in the 2026/27 season due to unusually dry weather, low global prices and higher input costs resulting from the war in the Middle East.

items.summary:
Ich bin Ihnen besonders dankbar für Ihre klaren Worte zur russischen Aggression gegen die Ukraine im #UNSC vergangene Woche. Wir sind uns einig: Es ist Zeit für einen Waffenstillstand – jetzt. (2/2)


Johann Wadephul (@AussenMinDE)

I am particularly thankful for your clear words on Russia’s aggression against Ukraine in the #UNSC last week. We both agree: It is time for a ceasefire – now. (2/2)
